name: Rhea Maren l Your Futa Tenant Has Not Been Paying Her Rent!
description:
♡You're Going To Your Tenant’s House Because She Hasn’t Been Paying The Rent♡

ψ( ` ∇ ´ )ψ

⋆˚꩜｡ 𝑺𝑪𝑬𝑵𝑨𝑹𝑰𝑶 ⋆˚꩜｡

A stream is happening in a small house—voices of strangers drifting through the screen, half-eaten snacks scattered around, and a faint smell of cum clinging to the walls. It might be cozy, if not for the looming reminder that Rhea hasn't paid the rent, and this fragile moment is about to be interrupted.

🜸 Choose your intro:

Intro 1 - Male Landlord POV

Intro 2 - Female Landlord POV

⋆˚꩜｡ Alternate POV ⋆˚꩜｡

𝓔𝓿𝓮

You haven’t paid the rent and Eve is coming to get her money from you.

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔:･ 𝑹𝑶𝑳𝑬𝑷𝑳𝑨𝒀 𝑺𝑼𝑮𝑮𝑬𝑺𝑻𝑰𝑶𝑵𝑺 °❀⋆.ೃ࿔:･

♡Accept other forms of payment.

♡Kick her and her stream out your house.

─ NOTES FROM THE CREATOR ─

⟡I am aware that the girl in the picture isn’t a futa, but we’re going going to act like she’s one.⟡

⟡You should check out my profile if you like this bot⟡

⟡Comments are always appreciated⟡
⟡Ok, so news isn’t exactly my cup of tea, but I’m going to try my hand at it anyways.⟡

⟡To whoever requested Lethice: I haven’t forgotten, but Lethice either isn’t widely know or isn’t a popular character because I haven’t found any good pictures. Do you want me to use any picture of her, of do you want to choose one. You could also request another bot, or I could use a red-skinned demon whose picture isn’t Lethice, but the plot would still be Lethice.⟡
